human_readable_role_description: Finance review validates budget availability, allocation continuity, and financial exposure before institutional handoff.
Legal review validates contractual and institutional legal review continuity before handoff.
Management board review handles high-risk and institutionally sensitive approvals.
Executive review handles institution-level approval continuity and exceptional authorization paths.
Executive override is an exceptional continuity mechanism requiring explicit justification and post-event review.
Program review validates grant-related operational and delivery context.
Document review validates attachment continuity and supporting evidence readiness.
Research review validates research collaboration and institutional partnership continuity.
IT review validates technical procurement and infrastructure continuity.
Administration review validates operational procurement readiness.
Communications review validates outreach and communication activity continuity.
Travel review validates travel-related operational context and institutional justification.
Governance review evaluates institutional governance exposure and review continuity.
Internal audit escalation review preserves institutional accountability continuity when conflicting review states appear.
Security review validates operational and institutional security continuity.
Program director review handles institutional program-level authorization continuity.
Compliance observer role is informational only and cannot approve institutional actions.
